hero.title: We're Looking for Talented Editors
hero.subtitle: Be part of a global team of professional editors. Work on interesting projects with flexible schedules.

about.title: Why Work With Us?
about.description: We offer a flexible and rewarding environment for talented editors
about.intro: We're looking for editors passionate about creating quality content. We offer diverse projects, competitive pay, and the freedom to work from anywhere.
about.experience: Our platform connects you to global clients, ensuring a constant flow of interesting projects. You choose which projects to accept and set your own pace.
about.passion: We value creativity and quality. If you're detail-oriented, organized, and love video editing, we want you on our team.

items.content: I've been working here for 2 years and it's amazing! Varied projects, on-time payment, and total schedule flexibility.
items.name: Maria Silva

items.content: The best platform for freelance editors. Exceptional support and quality clients.
items.name: João Santos

jobPosting.title: Freelance Video Editor
jobPosting.description: Unique opportunity to work as a video editor and earn 90% of AdSense from edited videos
jobPosting.qualifications: Video editing experience, knowledge of editing software
jobPosting.responsibilities: Edit videos for YouTube, apply thumbnails, optimize for SEO

faqs.question: How does the 90% AdSense payment work?
faqs.answer: You receive 90% of all AdSense revenue generated by the videos you edit. Payment is made monthly via PIX.

faqs.question: Do I need specific equipment?
faqs.answer: You need a computer capable of running editing software and stable internet connection for video uploads.

faqs.question: How much can I earn per month?
faqs.answer: Earnings vary according to video performance. Experienced editors can earn between R$ 2,000 to R$ 8,000+ per month.

faqs.question: What is the selection process like?
faqs.answer: We analyze your portfolio, conduct a practical editing test and an interview to assess compatibility.
